name: Honey Vanilla Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
--------------------------
GINGERSNAP CRUST
32 Old Fashioned gingersnap cookies, crushed
2 tablespoons Sugar
1 Egg white
CHEESECAKE
In a food processor or blender, blend until smooth: cream cheese, cottage cheese, ricotta cheese, and cornstarch. Add honey and vanilla extract, then blend again. Add egg substitute and blend until the mixture is smooth. Pour into prepared crust (see below). Bake at 300 degrees Fahrenheit for 20 minutes, then reduce oven temperature to 250 degrees Fahrenheit and bake an additional 60 minutes or until the sides are set and the center is firm but not sloshing. Turn off the oven and allow the cake to cool in the oven for 1 hour. Remove and let cool to room temperature before chilling, covered, overnight before slicing. Serve topped with pureed strawberries or raspberries, adding a bit of sugar if desired. Makes 16 servings.
GINGERSNAP CRUST
Combine thoroughly in a food processor or blender: gingersnap cookies and sugar. Add egg white, blending until the mixture is moistened. Press into the bottom and up the sides of an 8- or 9-inch springform pan. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 10 to 12 minutes. Remove crust from oven. Reduce heat to 300 degrees Fahrenheit. Fill an oven-proof dish with about 1 inch of warm water and place it at the back of the oven to provide steam for the cheesecake while it bakes.
